info.longName: Simplify US Equity PLUS Bitcoin Strategy ETF

funds_data.description: Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in equity securities of U.S. companies and, exchange-traded products with direct exposure to Bitcoin (“Bitcoin ETPs”), and exchange-traded funds with indirect exposure to Bitcoin through Bitcoin futures options,swaps,or other derivative instruments (“Bitcoin ETFs”).
